description: Kate Bell is Assistant General Secretary at the TUC , responsible for inter-union relations and leads on TUC internal matters. Kate joined the TUC in 2016 as the organisation’s head of economics, international and employment rights. She played a leading role in representing the views of working people during the pandemic. Before working in the TUC , Kate worked as Head of Policy and Public Affairs for a local authority and has also worked for the charities Child Poverty Action Group and Gingerbread.

Kate Bell is Assistant General Secretary at the TUC, responsible for inter-union relations and leads on TUC internal matters. Kate joined the TUC in 2016 as the organisation’s head of economics, international and employment rights. She played a leading role in representing the views of working people during the pandemic. Before working in the TUC, Kate worked as Head of Policy and Public Affairs for a local authority and has also worked for the charities Child Poverty Action Group and Gingerbread.

Members of the Industrial Strategy Advisory Council (ISAC) contribute to the development and long-term delivery of HM Government’s industrial strategy. They work with the ISAC chair and other ISAC members to produce independent, evidence-based recommendations that directly inform government policy.
